name: BUILD-A-BEAR WORKSHOP INC
business: Build-A-Bear Workshop, Inc. is a global "retailtainment" brand that offers an interactive experience where guests create personalized stuffed animals through a unique stuffing, dressing, accessorizing, and naming process. The company also sells pre-stuffed plush, gifts, and licensed merchandise, and operates through corporately-managed stores, e-commerce, partner-operated locations, and international franchises.

exposures.sentence: Our use of artificial intelligence technologies presents operational, reputational, data security and legal risks that could adversely affect our business and financial performance, and any failure to effectively leverage artificial technologies in our business could negatively impact our customer engagement and competitive position.
We are subject to a number of risks related to disruptions, failures or security breaches of our information technology infrastructure.

At the same time, our e-commerce business remains our single largest store, serving as a key information destination and a highly complementary channel that extends our reach beyond the core by over-indexing with teen and adult gifting and collectible consumers.

catalysts.event: Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend program of $0.22 per share
catalysts.sentence: On March 12, 2025, our Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend program of $0.22 per share representing an increase of 10%, to evolve its strategic use of capital.

catalysts.event: Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, on March 11, 2026, the Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share of issued and outstanding common stock, representing an increase of 4.5%.
